title: Commit window for Codex identity follow-up plan
body: Opened git:index/head claim dbc57a99-bf71-42be-8d5f-d105ae285c71 for docs(agentic): add codex identity follow-up plan. Intended pathspecs are the Codex identity follow-up plan, its agentic-engineering plan indexes, and this generated comms entry. Security-and-privacy planning WIP remains excluded.
